response.justification: Maria possesses excellent geospatial data experience through her work on GISCollective and a strong background in high-throughput distributed systems. However, her recent professional experience heavily favors TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang. With her last professional C++ role dating back to 2015 and no Rust experience, her primary technology stack misaligns with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive domain expertise in geospatial data platforms and GIS applications.
Proven ability to engineer high-throughput, low-latency distributed microservices.
Demonstrated adaptability and willingness to work across diverse technology stacks.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust.
Most recent C++ experience is dated (2014-2015).
No explicit experience with routing algorithms or navigation pipelines.
